title: 3套JK制服搭配🔥附价格参考！甜酷风一网打尽
body_text:
姐妹们！是不是还在纠结JK制服怎么搭才不显土？我花了一周时间整理了3套日常又出圈的搭配，从水手服到西式都覆盖啦～

✅第一套：经典水手服+纯色百褶裙
上衣选择绀色关东襟水手服（约120元），搭配灰色百褶裙（约80元），领结用同色系（15元）。整体清爽乖巧，适合上学或日常出街，配上小白鞋活力满满！

✅第二套：西式制服+格裙+开衫
白色短袖衬衫（约90元）打底，外穿卡其色毛衣开衫（约150元），下身搭配红蓝格纹百褶裙（约100元）。这套温柔又有层次感，秋冬叠穿大衣也好看，配乐福鞋或马丁靴都🉑！

✅第三套：纯色卫衣+格裙+堆堆袜
宽松灰色连帽卫衣（约110元）搭配深蓝格裙（约90元），露出白色堆堆袜（约20元）和帆布鞋。街头休闲风，拍照超上镜，而且完全不挑身材！

💡小tips：领结/领带买绀色或红色最百搭；袜子选白色或黑色中筒袜；发饰可以用蝴蝶结发夹增加细节～

快艾特你的笨蛋闺蜜一起穿JK出街吧！组队拍照直接封神！

pages.title: 三套总览
pages.hook: JK穿搭合集，甜酷日常任你选！
pages.story: 三套JK搭配覆盖水手服、西式和休闲风，每套都标注了单品价格和风格标签，学生党也能轻松入手。
pages.layout_hint: 三套JK穿搭拼图，每套一个小格子，标注风格标签和总价，背景校园绿茵场

pages.title: 水手服搭配
pages.hook: 经典绀色水手服，乖巧学院风！
pages.story: 绀色关东襟水手服搭配灰色百褶裙，领结点缀细节。上衣版型挺括，不显肩宽；裙摆褶皱立体，A字版型显腿长。配白色中筒袜和黑色玛丽珍鞋，清新又减龄。
pages.layout_hint: 全身穿搭照，左侧标注单品价格，右侧特写领结和裙褶，文字标注关键卖点

pages.title: 西式制服搭
pages.hook: 温柔开衫+格裙，叠穿超好看！
pages.story: 白色衬衫打底，卡其色开衫增加层次感，红蓝格纹裙点亮全身。开衫面料柔软不扎人，格裙颜色正、不易皱。配棕色乐福鞋和同色系斜挎包，日系氛围感拉满。
pages.layout_hint: 模特侧身站立，展示开衫和格裙的叠穿效果，右侧用箭头标注层次，背景图书馆书架

pages.title: 卫衣休闲搭
pages.hook: 没想到JK还能这么穿！运动休闲风。
pages.story: 灰色连帽卫衣搭配深蓝格裙，白色堆堆袜露出脚踝。卫衣Oversize版型遮肉显瘦，格裙百褶不炸褶。配白色帆布鞋和双肩包，逛街上课都舒服，拍照姿势随便摆。
pages.layout_hint: 摆拍姿势：模特坐在地上，双腿前伸，展现卫衣和格裙的搭配，地面点缀落叶，文字标注价格

pages.title: 配饰点睛
pages.story: 推荐几个百搭配饰：绀色或红色领结/领带（约20元）、白色中筒袜（15元）、黑色玛丽珍鞋（180元）、蝴蝶结发夹（10元）。这些单品能瞬间提升精致度，且不挑套装。
pages.layout_hint: 俯拍桌面，摆放领结、袜子、发夹和鞋子，用白色手绘圆圈标注重点，背景为木质桌面

pages.title: 场景穿搭
pages.hook: 不同场合该穿哪套？这里帮你选！
pages.story: 上学首选水手服，乖巧不张扬；约会/拍照穿西式开衫格裙，温柔显气质；运动/逛街选卫衣格裙，自在又时尚。每套搭配都在日常可穿范围内，不会太夸张。
pages.layout_hint: 左中右三列拼图，每列对应一个场景，人物剪影+文字说明，背景为街景/教室/公园模糊图

pages.title: 搭配技巧
pages.hook: 100元也能穿出高级感？学会这3点！
pages.story: 1.领结颜色和裙色呼应（如红蓝格裙配红色领结）。2.袜子长度选膝盖下10厘米最显腿长。3.上衣塞进裙子时留一点松量，避免紧绷。还可以用腰带/腰包提高腰线。
pages.layout_hint: 手绘标注线图片，在模特腿部位置画出袜长参考线，衣角处标注松量，背景为纯色清爽色调

pages.title: 总结推荐
pages.hook: 把这篇码住，就足够搞定JK穿搭！
pages.story: 三套加起来总花费约615元（不含鞋），每套都能单穿或混搭。水手服最经典，西式最温柔，卫衣最日常，新手闭眼入不踩雷！还想看更多搭配吗？评论区告诉我你最想配什么上衣！
pages.layout_hint: 总结卡片式：中间放三套JK拼图，下方主题文字+价格总数，底部互动引导“戳我留言”按钮

cover_prompt: Portrait 3:4 vertical. Top 20%: bold Chinese title '3套JK制服搭配🔥附价格参考！甜酷风一网打尽' in white with blue glow, centered. Middle 60%: three dynamic full-body silhouettes of sailor, western cardigan, and hoodie JK styles overlapping, shot from low angle with motion blur and sun flares, models with different hairstyles. Bottom 20%: Chinese text '总价约615元起' in a soft gradient circle with small tag '学生党必备'. Background: school lawn with bright green and clear sky, warm natural light, 5% margin. No dark colors.

image_prompts.prompt: Xiaohongshu poster, vertical 3:4, info-graphic style. Include Chinese text labels, price tags, and titles visible on the image. Showing: 三套总览. Clean layout, professional, readable Chinese text.

Portrait 3:4 vertical. Left 55%: full-body front view of a model with shoulder-length hair and round face, wearing navy sailor uniform and gray pleated skirt, standing with hands at sides, soft lighting. Right 45%: two inset circular close-ups of bow tie and skirt pleats. Chinese text on left: '上衣约120元 裙子约80元' in thin font. Right insets have '领结约15元' and '褶皱立体' arrows. Background: pale blue gradient, 5% margin.

Portrait 3:4 vertical. Model (long face, high ponytail) standing in three-quarter view, wearing white shirt, beige cardigan, red-blue plaid skirt. Right side: diagonal arrow lines pointing to layers with Chinese labels '内搭衬衫约90', '开衫约150', '格裙约100'. Background: blurred library bookshelves in warm brown wood tone, soft natural light, 5% margin.

Portrait 3:4 vertical. Model (square face, double bun) sitting on ground, legs extended forward, wearing gray hoodie and dark blue plaid skirt, white stack socks visible. Ground with scattered autumn leaves. In front, three Chinese price tags: '卫衣约110', '格裙约90', '堆堆袜约20'. Background: blurred park path in soft gray, 5% margin.

Portrait 3:4 vertical. Top-down view on light wood table. Items arranged in circle: navy bow tie, white knee socks, hair clip with bow, black Mary Janes. White hand-drawn circles highlight each item with Chinese price labels: '领结约20', '中筒袜约15', '发夹约10', '玛丽珍鞋约180'. Soft natural light, 5% margin.

Portrait 3:4 vertical. Three vertical columns: left column with blue tint shows sailor girl silhouette and Chinese text '上学：水手服+黑皮鞋', middle column pink tint shows cardigan silhouette and '约会：开衫+格裙+乐福鞋', right column green tint shows hoodie silhouette and '逛街：卫衣+格裙+帆布鞋'. Each column has blurred scene background (classroom, park, street). 5% margin.

Portrait 3:4 vertical. Close-up on legs and waist of model (short hair, round face). On right leg, dashed line and arrow with Chinese '袜长：膝下10厘米'. On waist, arrow at tucked shirt with '塞衣角留松量'. Near neck, bow tie with '领结呼应格裙'. Background: solid light pink, hand-drawn style lines, 5% margin.

Portrait 3:4 vertical. Central card with rounded corners, light lavender gradient. Inside: three small circular thumbnails in a row, each showing a different JK outfit on different models. Below thumbnails, big Chinese text '总花费约615元起' in bold. Bottom of card: a button shape with Chinese text '戳我留言' and heart icon. Background: white with soft shadow, 5% margin.

title: JK穿搭合集✨甜美酷飒都有
body_text: 是不是还在纠结JK怎么搭？今天分享三套亲测好看的搭配，总花销约500起就能搞定！🔥绀色经典套装：衬衫+绀色西服+格裙，约350起，学院感满满。⭐温柔水手服：浅色水手服+纯色百褶裙，约200起，甜美值拉满。💡元气运动风：JK卫衣+格裙+运动鞋，约300起，日常又减龄。配饰推荐：领结约20，中筒袜约15，帆布包约50。姐妹们更喜欢哪一套？评论区告诉我～记得点赞收藏哦！

pages.title: 三套总览
pages.story: JK（女子高中生风格）三套搭配，从经典到甜美到运动，总花费约850起，性价比超高！每套都附单品和价格，学生党也能轻松驾驭。
pages.layout_hint: 九宫格拼图，中央大字“3套JK穿搭”，周围三张搭配小图，标注风格名称

pages.title: 绀色经典
pages.story: 衬衫+绀色西服+格裙，经典绀三件，约350起。搭配黑色皮鞋+中筒袜，学院感满满。适合日常上课、拍照，百搭不出错。
pages.layout_hint: 全身单图，左侧标注衬衫、西服、格裙名称和价格，箭头指向对应单品

pages.title: 温柔水手服
pages.story: 浅色水手服+纯色百褶裙，约200起。搭配玛丽珍鞋+蕾丝袜，减龄又温柔。建议扎双马尾或低马尾，瞬间回到校园时代。
pages.layout_hint: 全身单图，右侧标注水手服和百褶裙，下方加“甜美度⭐⭐⭐”文字

pages.title: 元气运动风
pages.story: JK卫衣+格裙+运动鞋，约300起。宽松卫衣遮肉显瘦，格裙增加少女感。适合上课、逛街，舒适度满分。
pages.layout_hint: 全身单图，背景为校园操场，人物动态抓拍，单品价格用气泡标注

pages.title: 配饰推荐
pages.story: 领结约20元、中筒袜约15元、帆布包约50元。领结选绀色或酒红，袜子选纯白或条纹，包包选大地色，瞬间提升精致度。
pages.layout_hint: 拼图：领结、袜子、包包三件小物排列，每件下方标价格，中央箭头“搭配出彩”

pages.title: 场景示范
pages.story: 校园场景：绀色经典+帆布包；约会场景：水手服+斜挎包；逛街场景：运动风+双肩包。一套穿搭可日常可拍照。
pages.layout_hint: 三张小图拼接，分别对应校园、约会、逛街，每张图下方文字标注场景和穿搭编号

pages.title: 版型对比
pages.story: 对比三个常见品牌的JK裙：A牌褶子硬挺不易散，约200起；B牌面料柔软但易皱，约150起；C牌性价比高，约120起。推荐选A牌，版型更挺括。
pages.layout_hint: 对比分屏：左中右三格，各放一条格裙局部特写，标注品牌和价格，对比褶子锐利度

pages.title: 总结推荐
pages.story: 三套总花费约850起，最推荐第一套绀色经典，百搭耐看。配饰选领结和袜子，细节加分。快收藏这篇，下次穿JK不迷茫～你有几套JK？评论区晒出你的穿搭！
pages.layout_hint: 总结卡片，中央三套小图缩略，下方大号文字“总花费约850起”，底部手写“你pick哪一套？”加箭头指向评论区

cover_prompt: Vertical 3:4 portrait, top 20%: large bold Chinese title 'JK穿搭合集✨甜美酷飒都有' centered, white text on soft pink gradient background with slight shadow. Middle 60%: main visual collage of three different JK outfits on three different models (one in navy blazer with plaid skirt, one in sailor uniform with pleated skirt, one in hoodie with plaid skirt) arranged in a triangular composition, soft natural lighting, shallow depth of field, cheerful expressions, campus background with cherry blossoms. Bottom 20%: small Chinese tag '3套搭配 总价约850起' in pastel blue, plus decorative star icons. Overall kawaii magazine cover style, 5% margin all around.

image_prompts.prompt: Xiaohongshu poster, vertical 3:4, info-graphic style. Include Chinese text labels, price tags, and titles visible on the image. Showing: 三套总览. Clean layout, professional, readable Chinese text.

Vertical 3:4 portrait, 5% margin, pale blue-gray gradient background. Top 10%: small Chinese title '绀色经典 谁穿谁显白' in navy. Middle 65%: full-body shot of a Japanese high school girl (long face, high ponytail, serious look) wearing navy school blazer with gold crest button, white dress shirt, red striped necktie, navy pleated miniskirt, black leather shoes, white knee-high socks, standing in front of a school gate, natural daylight. Left side: three Chinese annotation lines with arrows pointing to blazer, shirt, skirt: '绀色西服 约200起', '白衬衫 约80起', '格裙 约150起' in small white text on semi-transparent black bubble. Bottom 20%: info '学院经典 适合日常/拍照' plus a small shield icon.

Middle 65%: full-body shot of a Japanese high school girl (round face, double buns, sweet smile) wearing oversized navy sailor collar top with triple white stripes, red ribbon bow tie, light blue pleated miniskirt, Mary Jane shoes, lace socks, holding a small bouquet, standing on a green lawn, afternoon sunlight. Right side: two Chinese labels '水手服 约120起' and '百褶裙 约80起' in white boxes. Bottom 20%: large pink text '甜美度⭐⭐⭐', plus a small price '约200起'.

Vertical 3:4 portrait, 5% margin, sky blue background with subtle grass gradient. Top 10%: Chinese title '元气运动风 日常又减龄' in white. Middle 60%: dynamic full-body shot of a Japanese high school girl (short hair, wide smile, mid-run pose) wearing oversized gray hoodie, navy pleated miniskirt, white sneakers, backpack, on a school sports field with cherry blossom trees, motion blur effect on background, sunlight flare. Single items have speech bubble price tags: 'Jk卫衣 约180起' near hoodie, '格裙 约120起' near skirt. Bottom 25%: two color palette circles showing '灰粉' and '蓝白' with swatches, plus text '推荐配色'.

Vertical 3:4 portrait, 5% margin, warm cream background. Top 10%: Chinese title '配饰推荐 点睛之笔' in brown. Middle 65%: three items arranged diagonally (left to right): a red bow tie on a white stand (label '领结 约20'), a pair of striped knee-high socks (label '中筒袜 约15'), a tan canvas bag (label '帆布包 约50'), each with small Chinese price tag underneath. Center has a large curved arrow pointing from bow tie to bag, with text '搭配出彩' in orange script. Bottom 20%: scattered small star and heart icons in pastel colors.

Vertical 3:4 portrait, 5% margin, white background with subtle colored panels. Top 5%: Chinese title '场景示范 不同场合怎么穿' in gray. Middle 70%: three vertical panels side-by-side. Left panel: school gate scene, girl in navy blazer outfit (different model, long braids) holding books, Chinese text '校园: 经典绀色'. Middle panel: park bench scene, girl in sailor outfit (different model, low ponytail) with a shoulder bag, text '约会: 温柔水手'. Right panel: shopping street, girl in hoodie outfit (different model, messy bun) with backpack, text '逛街: 元气运动'. Each scene has soft vignette and label at bottom. Bottom 20%: decorative line '一套穿搭可日常可拍照'.

Vertical 3:4 portrait, 5% margin, pale gray background. Top 10%: Chinese title '版型对比 褶子锋利度差距大' in dark gray. Middle 65%: three close-up circles (left, center, right) each showing a plaid miniskirt pleat detail from different brands. Left: crisp sharp pleats, label 'A牌 约200起 挺括' in green. Center: softer pleats with slight wrinkle, label 'B牌 约150起 柔软' in orange. Right: standard pleats, label 'C牌 约120起 平价' in blue. Between circles: small arrow pointers comparing sharpness. Bottom 20%: Chinese text '推荐A牌，版型更挺括' in bold, plus a star.

Vertical 3:4 portrait, 5% margin, warm peach background. Top 10%: Chinese title '总结推荐 快来分享你的搭配' in coral. Middle 55%: three small thumbnail circles arranged centrally showing the three outfit full-body shots from P1, each labeled '绀色经典'/'温柔水手'/'元气运动'. Below them: large bold Chinese text '总花费约850起' in dark red, with a glowing effect. Bottom 30%: a hand-drawn style arrow pointing downward to a comment box area, text '你pick哪一套？评论区见' in handwritten font, plus small emoji of speech bubble. Overall card style with rounded corners and shadow.
